input:
I shouted this piece of happy news to the Muslims but the Prophet motioned me to keep quiet.” More support was coming to the Prophet and a group of his companions moved him to a well protected area at the foot of the mountain, where he was kept safe by a number of his followers. He wanted to climb a rock in the mountain but he was unable to do so because he had lost so much blood. Ṭalḥah ibn ʿUbaydellāh, however, sat underneath him and lifted him to help him climb the rock until he was over it.
Source: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 20: A Bitter Defeat

output.scene_title: The Prophet is Moved to a Safe Location
output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 20: A Bitter Defeat

characters.name: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)
characters.appearance: Late 50s, frail and weak due to injury, slight grey thinning hair. Wearing a simple white thobe. Always shown from behind, face never visible. Distinguished by worn cloak and bloodstains.

characters.name: Ṭalḥah ibn ʿUbaydellāh
characters.appearance: Late 20s, light brown skin, athletic build, strong facial features. Thick black beard, neat and well-groomed. Wearing off-white linen thobe, plain beige turban, simple leather sandals. Confident and compassionate expression.

output.moral_lesson: The Prophet's well-being is our top priority, and we must do everything in our power to protect and care for him.
output.narrative_text: As the Muslims tried to help the Prophet, they moved him to a safer location at the foot of the mountain. But he wanted to climb a rock, so Ṭalḥah ibn ʿUbaydellāh sat underneath him and lifted him up to help him reach it.

compliance.notes: The Prophet's face is not visible, and Ṭalḥah is shown with full face. The scene is calm and focuses on the Prophet's safety.

output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor illustration. A hilly mountainous background with a group of Arabs in humble clothing moving a frail older man in white thobe at the foot of the mountain. One man, Ṭalḥah, is shown sitting under the older man and lifting him up to help him climb a rock in the mountain. The older man's cloak is stained with blood. The illustration should focus on the gentle and compassionate interaction between Ṭalḥah and the Prophet. A warm and calming color palette. No modern objects.
